Headline: #94 California Temporary Southbound Reroute near California/Polk
ShortDescription: Southbound 94 California buses are temporarily rerouted via California, Harrison, Kedzie, Roosevelt and California: near California/Polk.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound #94 California buses are temporarily rerouted via California, Harrison, Kedzie, Roosevelt and California: due to, police activity near California/Polk.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
